title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners:
Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners!
